Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Trigger SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Set the special effect ID that will be the summoning condition

Fields.Name: NPC Param ID
Fields.Description: Set the NPC parameter ID of the summoned buddy

Fields.Name: NPC Think Param ID
Fields.Description: Sets the NPC Thinking Parameter ID of the summoned buddy

Fields.Name: NPC Param ID - Ride
Fields.Description: For buddies that you want to summon while riding, set the NPC parameter ID for the rider

Fields.Name: NPC Think Param ID - Ride
Fields.Description: For buddies that you want to summon while riding, set the NPC Thinking Parameter ID for the rider

Fields.Name: Spawn Offset: X (left/right)
Fields.Description: Sets the distance in meters to offset the buddy from the summon point to the X coordinate (left/right).

Fields.Name: Spawn Offset: Z (forward/back)
Fields.Description: Sets the distance in meters to offsets the buddy from the summon point to the Z coordinate (forwad/back).

Fields.Name: Spawn Angle: Y
Fields.Description: Sets summon position rotation.

Fields.Name: Appear near Stone Monument
Fields.Description: Forces summon to spawn at summon monument.

Fields.Name: Disable Player Target Share
Fields.Description: Disables summon targeting whoever PC locked-onto.

Fields.Name: Player Follow Type
Fields.Description: Determines PC tracking and non-combat behavior.
